content_type: memorial / Wall of Honor tribute card
description: Memorial graphic ('Wall of Honor') in portrait format. The right side shows a softly-lit photograph of red roses in front of a blurred American flag (stars and stripes visible), over a dark slate-gray textured background. The upper-left contains an inset framed portrait photograph of a man in an early or mid-20th-century uniform with a peaked officer's cap and badge, in front of a flag backdrop; the image is grainy and low-resolution. Across the lower-left in white serif type is 'Wall of Honor', accompanied by an ICE memorial badge with a blue ribbon (the badge reads 'ICE'). To the right of the badge: 'Special Agent / Anthony Cozza', then a gold horizontal rule, 'End of Watch' in serif, another gold rule, and the date 'Saturday, February 24, 1945'.
notable_text: Wall of Honor. Special Agent Anthony Cozza. End of Watch. Saturday, February 24, 1945.
